title: Occupational/Professional Licensing and Certification * Mental Health Counselors - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Occupational/Professional Licensing and Certification * Mental Health Counselors 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists the public by identifying and regulating the practice of licensed professional counselors and licensed marriage and family therapists. Investigates complaints regarding violations of the law and rules, and the competency of licensees. Issues new and renewed licenses, disciplines misconduct, and communicates information about licensure, practice, and discipline. Develops and maintains professional standards for the professions of professional counseling and marriage and family therapy. 3218 Pringle Road SE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-5499 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS
